关于艾美加教育顧問

English Text: Animetro Education Consulting supports high-net-worth families with long-term educational strategy, admissions planning, student development, school communication, and cross-border education resource integration.
Chinese Text: 艾美加教育顧問為高淨值家庭提供長期教育策略、升學規劃、學生發展支持、學校溝通與跨國教育資源整合。
關於艾美加教育顧問

English Text: Animetro is a federally registered Canadian company based in Toronto, with roots dating back to 2002. Animetro Education Consulting operates as its education consulting brand, focusing on long-term educational strategy, admissions planning, student development support, and cross-border education resource integration for high-net-worth families.
Chinese Text: 艾美加 是一家總部位於多倫多的加拿大聯邦註冊公司，自 2002 年起建立品牌與服務基礎。艾美加教育顧問作為其教育顧問品牌，專注於為高淨值家庭提供長期教育策略、升學規劃、學生發展支持與跨國教育資源整合。
願景

English Text: To build a boutique educational ecosystem that helps gifted, neurodivergent, highly sensitive, and intellectually unique students grow into confident, resilient, self-aware, and authentically differentiated individuals through long-term developmental guidance, whole-person education, and meaningful human connection. We envision an educational model that goes beyond admissions outcomes and supports students in building meaningful, balanced, and sustainable lives.
Chinese Text: 建立一個精品化的教育成長生態系統，透過長期成長指導、完整人格教育與深度人文陪伴，幫助具備天賦、多元學習特質、高敏感度與獨特思維方式的學生，逐漸成長為自信、有韌性、有方向感、情緒穩定且具有真實差異化特質的人。我們希望建立的教育，不僅關注申請結果，而是真正幫助學生建立長期、有意義、平衡且可持續的人生.
使命

English Text: Our mission is to provide long-term educational strategy, developmental mentorship, and ecosystem-based support that empowers students and families to navigate academic growth, emotional development, leadership, identity formation, executive function, and future educational pathways with clarity, confidence, and sustainability. We believe education is not about manufacturing perfect applicants, but about nurturing authentic human potential.
Chinese Text: 我們的使命是透過長期教育策略、成長指導與生態系統式支持，幫助學生與家庭建立學術成長能力、情緒發展、領導力、自我認同、執行功能與長期教育路徑，並以清晰、自信與可持續的方式面對未來。我們相信，教育不是製造完美申請者，而是幫助學生逐漸成長為最真實、最穩定、最有生命力的自己。
核心價值觀

English Text: Nurture the Nature: Every child has a unique developmental rhythm, cognitive profile, emotional pattern, and life trajectory. Whole-Person Development: True success requires balance between academic growth, emotional well-being, mental health, physical health, resilience, relationships, and long-term sustainability. Authentic Growth Over Artificial Packaging: We prioritize authentic long-term development over short-term admissions manipulation or superficial profile engineering. Long-Term Developmental Partnership: Meaningful educational development requires trust, consistency, communication, strategic alignment, and long-term accompaniment. Emotional Safety & Human Dignity: Students deserve to feel understood, emotionally safe, respected, and valued beyond performance metrics.
Chinese Text: 順勢培養：每個學生都有獨特的認知方式、情緒特質、天賦、成長節奏與人生軌跡。完整人格發展：真正長期可持續的成功，必須建立在學術成長、情緒健康、心理健康、身體健康、韌性、人際關係與長期生活平衡之上。真實成長高於短期包裝：我們重視真實長期成長，而不是短期包裝、表面定位、履歷工程或不自然的申請操作。長期成長型合作：真正有價值的教育支持，需要信任、一致性、溝通、長期策略對齊與持續陪伴。情緒安全與人的尊嚴：學生不應只被 GPA、排名、競賽或外在成就定義。他們需要被理解、尊重、接納，並擁有情緒安全感。
企業文化

English Text: Our culture is built on long-term trust, intellectual honesty, emotional empathy, strategic thinking, deep personalization, ecosystem collaboration, and meaningful human relationships. We operate as a boutique educational ecosystem rather than a large-scale transactional agency. We value depth over scale, quality over quantity, alignment over sales, and authentic development over superficial prestige.
Chinese Text: 我們的企業文化建立在長期信任、認知誠實、情緒共情、戰略思維、深度個性化、資源整合與有意義的人際關係之上。我們不是大規模交易型機構，而是一個精品教育成長生態系統。我們更重視深度高於規模、品質高於數量、理念匹配高於銷售，以及真實成長高於表面名校光環。
教育理念

English Text: Education is not simply about helping students enter elite schools. Education is about helping students understand themselves, build confidence, develop resilience, maintain emotional well-being, discover meaningful direction, and become capable of building fulfilling lives.
Chinese Text: 教育並不只是把學生送進名校。真正有意義的教育，是幫助學生認識自己、建立自信、發展韌性、保持情緒健康、找到有意義的方向，並逐漸擁有建立豐富人生的能力。
我們的顧問團隊

English Text: Animetro Education Consulting operates through a boutique advisory and resource-integration model. Based on each student’s needs, we bring together education consultants, mentors, writing advisors, STEM coaches, and student development specialists across North America and Asia.
Chinese Text: 艾美加教育顧問採用精品化顧問與資源整合模式，根據每位學生與家庭的具體需求，整合北美、亞洲與專業教育領域的顧問、導師、寫作教練、STEM 教練與學生成長支持資源。

English Text: Emily Huang | Founder & Strategic Education Consultant | Canada / North America | Emily specializes in long-term educational strategy, private school and university pathway planning, neurodiversity-informed student support, family education strategy, GPA management, school communication, and whole-person development.
Chinese Text: Emily Huang｜創辦人｜戰略教育顧問｜加拿大 / 北美｜Emily 專注於長期教育策略、菁英私校與大學申請路徑規劃、多元學習學生支持、家庭教育策略、GPA 管理、學校溝通與完整人格發展。

English Text: Leonard Wong| Co-Founder & Senior Education Strategy Advisor | MBA, Ohio University; Bachelor’s degree in English Literature, Beijing Foreign Languages Institute | Leonard specializes in strategic education consulting, holistic essay development, personal narrative building, academic positioning, and long-term student growth strategy.
Chinese Text: Leonard Wong｜聯合創辦人｜資深教育策略顧問｜Ohio University MBA；北京外國語學院英語文學學士｜Leonard 專注於教育策略諮詢、整體文書規劃、個人敘事塑造、學術定位與學生長期成長策略。

English Text: Frances Wong | Co-Founder & Asia Strategic Partnerships Lead | MBA; Based in Hong Kong and Beijing | Frances brings over 25 years of experience in venture capital, senior government relations, cross-border business development, strategic partnerships, and high-net-worth family relationship management. She supports Asia-based families with regional communication, education partnership development, resource coordination, and cross-border education planning.
Chinese Text: Frances Wong｜聯合創辦人｜亞洲戰略合作與高端家庭關係負責人｜MBA；常駐香港及北京｜Frances 擁有超過 25 年創投、資深政府關係、跨境商務發展、戰略合作與高淨值家庭關係管理經驗。她負責支持亞洲家庭溝通、區域教育合作、資源協調與跨國教育規劃。

English Text: Dr. Lloyd | Strategic Partner & Senior U.S. Education Strategy Advisor | Based in Philadelphia | Dr. Lloyd is a strategic partner of Animetro Education Consulting and brings over 40 years of experience in education consulting, U.S. school and university advising, academic pathway planning, student development, and family education guidance. He supports families with U.S. education strategy, university positioning, long-term student development, and educational fit within the North American education system.
Chinese Text: Dr. Lloyd｜戰略合作夥伴｜美國教育策略資深顧問｜常駐費城｜Dr. Lloyd 是艾美加教育顧問的戰略合作夥伴，擁有超過 40 年教育顧問、美國學校與大學升學指導、學術路徑規劃、學生發展與家庭教育諮詢經驗。他支持家庭進行美國教育策略、大學定位、長期學生發展與北美教育體系下的教育匹配規劃。

English Text: Prof. David | Senior Psychology & Student Development Advisor | PhD, University of Waterloo; Professor at the University of Toronto | Prof. David brings over 35 years of experience in psychology, student development, learning profiles, emotional well-being, and family support. As a Senior Advisor for Animetro Education Consulting, he supports the development of student well-being, psychoeducational understanding, and whole-person growth frameworks.
Chinese Text: Prof. David｜資深心理學與學生發展顧問｜University of Waterloo 博士；University of Toronto 教授｜Prof. David 擁有超過 35 年心理學、學生發展、學習特質、情緒健康與家庭支持經驗。作為艾美加教育顧問的資深顧問，他支持學生心理健康、心理教育理解與完整人格成長框架的發展。

English Text: Brooke Duan | Boarding School & Student Life Advisor; Director of Art Portfolio Development | Master’s degree in Print Media, Central Academy of Fine Arts; Senior Curator and Donor, Gu Yuan Art Museum, China; Project-Based Special Curator, The Metropolitan Museum of Art | Brooke has contributed to the preservation, donation, and public presentation of Gu Yuan’s artistic legacy, including the donation of over 300 pieces of Gu Yuan’s artworks and related materials to the Gu Yuan Art Museum. She supports students with boarding school adjustment, student life planning, and art portfolio development.
Chinese Text: Brooke Duan｜寄宿學校與學生生活顧問；藝術作品集發展總監｜中央美術學院版畫專業碩士；中國古元美術館資深策展人與捐贈人；美國大都會藝術博物館項目制特邀策展人｜Brooke 長期參與古元藝術遺產的保存、捐贈與公共展示工作，包括向中國古元美術館捐贈超過 300 件古元藝術作品及相關資料。她支持學生寄宿學校適應、學生生活規劃與藝術作品集發展。

常见问题
你們主要服務哪些家庭？

English Text: We work with families seeking strategic education planning for private school, university, GPA management, STEAM, athletics, and gifted learner development.
Chinese Text: 我們服務希望進行私校申請、大學申請、GPA 管理、STEAM 發展、學生運動員規劃與招募，以及天賦學生與多元學習學生發展的家庭。

English Text: Do you provide both English and Chinese support?
Chinese Text: 你們提供英文和中文服務嗎？

English Text: Yes. Animetro provides bilingual communication support while keeping the website English and Chinese versions separate.
Chinese Text: 是的。艾美加教育顧問可以提供中英文沟通支持，但网站会保持英文版和中文版分开显示。

English Text: How are you different from traditional admissions agencies?
Chinese Text: 你們和傳統升學機構最大的不同是什麼？

English Text: Animetro Education Consulting is not a large-scale transactional admissions agency. We operate as a boutique, deeply personalized education consulting practice focused on long-term growth, educational fit, whole-person development, and sustainable strategic planning.
Chinese Text: 艾美加教育顧問不是大型流水線式升學機構，而是精品化、深度陪伴型的教育顧問服務。我們不只關注短期申請包裝，而更重視學生的長期成長路徑、教育環境匹配、自我認同建立、完整人格發展與可持續的教育策略。

English Text: Do you only help with school applications?
Chinese Text: 你們只是幫學生申請學校嗎？

English Text: No. We do not only help students complete one application. We provide long-term support in educational strategy, academic planning, activity development, school selection, family decision-making, student well-being, and future identity building.
Chinese Text: 不是。我們不只是協助學生完成一次申請，而是從長期教育策略、學業管理、活動發展、學校選擇、家庭決策、心理健康與學生未來身份塑造等方面提供整體支持。

English Text: Do you support gifted, neurodivergent, or highly sensitive students?
Chinese Text: 你們支持天賦、多元學習或高敏感學生嗎？

English Text: Yes. We pay close attention to students’ cognitive profiles, emotional needs, executive function, school adjustment, identity development, and long-term growth. Many high-potential students need a more personalized support system to thrive.
Chinese Text: 是的。我們特別關注學生的認知方式、情緒需求、執行功能、學校適應、自我認同與長期發展。很多高潛力學生需要更個性化的支持系統，才能真正穩定成長。

English Text: We support families when parents are temporarily outside Canada, traveling, returning home, or unable to manage student matters in person. Our short-term guardianship and student care support may include school communication, emergency contact support, daily care coordination, regular family updates, and assistance with school, medical, or accommodation-related matters when needed.
Chinese Text: 我們為父母短期不在加拿大、臨時出差、返國或無法親自處理學生事務的家庭，提供短期監護與學生照顧支持。服務可包括學校溝通、緊急聯絡、生活安排協調、家長定期回報，以及必要時協助處理醫療、學校或住宿相關事務，幫助學生在父母不在身邊期間保持學業、生活與情緒穩定。

English Text: We support families exploring private schools, boarding schools, and international education pathways through in-depth school visit planning, interview preparation, school communication, and family decision support. This service may include school shortlisting, campus visit planning, student and parent interview preparation, first-round interview coaching, post-visit strategy review, and coordination of vacation programs, short-term stays, or student care when needed.
Section ID: 我們為正在考慮私立學校、寄宿學校或國際教育路徑的家庭，提供深度訪校、學校溝通、面試準備與家庭決策支持。服務可包括學校名單規劃、校園參訪安排、學生與家長面試準備、第一輪面試輔導、訪校後策略分析，以及必要時的假期營隊、短期住宿或學生照顧協調。
